zh.Vladimir, Vladimir, Vladimir, Vladimirsk: 俄羅斯Владимирская ОбластьВладимир弗拉基米爾弗拉基米爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Princess Anna von Kaschin "The Saint"於1280年出生在俄羅斯Ростовская時，她的父親Dmitrij Borisovich, Duke Of Rostov And Uglich27歲，母親Mrs. Dmitrij Borisovich Duchess Of Rostov25歲。她於1292年與Ivan Dmitrievich Duke Of Pereyaslavl在俄羅斯Ярославская областьРостов結婚。她去世於1368年10月2日在俄羅斯特維也卡辛享年88歲，埋葬在多明尼加共和國。

zh-hans.Vladimir, Vladimir, Vladimir, Vladimirsk: 俄罗斯Владимирская ОбластьВладимир弗拉基米爾弗拉基米爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Princess Anna von Kaschin "The Saint"于1280年出生在俄罗斯Ростовская时，她的父亲Dmitrij Borisovich, Duke Of Rostov And Uglich27岁，母亲Mrs. Dmitrij Borisovich Duchess Of Rostov25岁。她于1292年与Ivan Dmitrievich Duke Of Pereyaslavl在俄罗斯Ярославская областьРостов结婚。她去世于1368年10月2日在俄罗斯特維也卡辛享年88岁，埋葬在多米尼加共和国。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Anna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

variants.name: Anne
meanings: A name corrpted from Hannah, q.v. It is also found several times in a male name. From Ann, Anne, we have as nicknames Nan and Nancy

en.lifeSummary: When Princess Anna von Kaschin "The Saint" was born in 1280, in Rostov, Russia, her father, Dmitrij Borisovich, Duke Of Rostov And Uglich, was 27 and her mother, Mrs. Dmitrij Borisovich Duchess Of Rostov, was 25. She married Ivan Dmitrievich Duke Of Pereyaslavl in 1292, in Rostova, Yaroslavl Oblast, Russia. She died on 2 October 1368, in Kashin, Tver', Russia, at the age of 88, and was buried in Dominican Republic.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Princess Anna von Kaschin "The Saint" est née en 1280, à Rostov, Russie, son père, Dmitrij Borisovich, Duke Of Rostov And Uglich, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Dmitrij Borisovich Duchess Of Rostov, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Ivan Dmitrievich Duke Of Pereyaslavl en 1292, à Rostova, Yaroslavskaya Oblast', Russie. Elle est décédée le 2 octobre 1368, à Kashin, Tver', Russie, à l’âge de 88 ans, et a été enterrée à République dominicaine.

de.lifeSummary: Als Princess Anna von Kaschin "The Saint" 1280 in Rostov, Russland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Dmitrij Borisovich, Duke Of Rostov And Uglich 27 und ihre Mutter Mrs. Dmitrij Borisovich Duchess Of Rostov 25. Sie hat 1292 in Rostova, Yaroslavskaya Oblast', Russland Ivan Dmitrievich Duke Of Pereyaslavl geheiratet. Sie starb am 2. Oktober 1368 im Alter von 88 Jahren in Kashin, Tver', Russland und wurde in Dominikanische Republik begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Princess Anna von Kaschin "The Saint" è nata il nel 1280 nel Rostov, Russia, sua padre, Dmitrij Borisovich, Duke Of Rostov And Uglich, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Mrs. Dmitrij Borisovich Duchess Of Rostov, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato Ivan Dmitrievich Duke Of Pereyaslavl nel 1292, nel Rostova, Yaroslavskaya Oblast', Russia. Morì il 2 ottobre 1368, nel Kashin, Tver', Russia, all'età di 88 anni, e fu sepolta a Repubblica Dominicana.

ko.lifeSummary: Princess Anna von Kaschin "The Saint"(이)가 1280년 러시아 Ростовская에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Dmitrij Borisovich, Duke Of Rostov And Uglich(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs. Dmitrij Borisovich Duchess Of Rostov(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1292년 러시아 Ярославская область Ростов에서 Ivan Dmitrievich Duke Of Pereyaslavl(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1368년 10월 2일 러시아 트버' 카신에서 88세의 나이로 사망했으며 도미니카공화국에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com Ivan Dmitrievich Duke Of Pereyaslavl em 1292, em Rostova, Yaroslavskaya Oblast', Rússia. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Princess Anna von Kaschin "The Saint" родилась в 1280 г. в местности Ростовская, Россия, её отцу по имени Dmitrij Borisovich, Duke Of Rostov And Uglich было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Dmitrij Borisovich Duchess Of Rostov, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Ivan Dmitrievich Duke Of Pereyaslavl в 1292 г. в местности Ростов, Ярославская область, Россия. Она умерла 2 октября 1368 г. в местности касин, твир', Россия в возрасте 88 лет и была похоронена в местности Доминиканская Республика.
